commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh I also will do this unto you; I will even appoint over you terror, consumption, and the burning fever, that shall consume the eyes, and cause sorrow of heart: and you shall sow your seed in vain, for your enemies shall eat it. Hebrew kaddachath, is rendered "scab and jaundice "by the Septuagint: and by others "a dangerous wind "like that which causes so many diseases in Egypt. The precise meaning of some terms in this verse is not well known.
